calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Claudia Choy for Eddy You Poy Yuen.

Ms. Choy stated that they did see the Examiner's notes. The Court stated that they could go ahead and distribute but as to the other beneficiaries waiving their interest in the real property; it was too late; they could just assign it. Ms. Choy stated that they were hoping to bypass some of the administrative requirements/expenses. The Court requested counsel submit a new order which would incorporate the denial of the disclaimers (granted subject to review of a revised order).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez and Deputy A. Kendall.
